name: Irwin Corey
abstract: Irwin Corey (July 29, 1914 – February 6, 2017) was an American stand-up comic, film actor and activist, often billed as "The World's Foremost Authority". He introduced his unscripted, improvisational style of stand-up comedy at the San Francisco club the hungry i.

concerts.label: Cavalcade of Stars to Benefit the Shield Institute

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Barbutti
about_quotes.evidence: I put people together that had never been together before to see if the sparks would fly, and it really worked beautifully. Like Phyllis Diller and Irwin Corey.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Barbutti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 8, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: off and on at the Vanguard I worked with trios and they had acts on the bill like Pete Seeger, Professor Irwin Corey.
